---
title: "Maria Matilda Harris"
---

## Maria Matilda Harris

**Dates:** (b.1817/18)

**Maiden name:** (Hickley)

### Description

wife of Captain William Charles Harris, chief constable of Hampshire

### Biography

She was born in Portsmouth and married Harris in 1837.

### Letters

- Letter from Otterbourn  Friday [December 1854?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
